title: A Town Class for the Future
article_text: Our class is about a small town. The subject of the class is the town's development. A clear plan is on top of our list for the future. We have a break of half an hour per day. The town's food is a big part of its value. We want to win a prize for our project. The project will involve many people among the town. We need to reach a goal before the end of the year. Five years ago, the town had only one office. The town's color is either blue or green in my mind.

sentences.en: Our class is about a small town.
sentences.zh: 我们的课是关于一个小镇的。

words.eng_def: a group of students who learn together
a small place where people live and work

sentences.en: The subject of the class is the town's development.
sentences.zh: 这堂课的主题是小镇的发展。

words.eng_def: the main idea of a class or lesson
the process of growing or improving

sentences.en: A clear plan is on top of our list for the future.
sentences.zh: 一个清晰的计划在我们列表的顶部，为了未来。

words.eng_def: the time that will come after now

sentences.en: We have a break of half an hour per day.

words.eng_def: a short time when you stop working
one of two equal parts of something

sentences.en: The town's food is a big part of its value.
sentences.zh: 小镇的食物是其价值的重要部分。

sentences.en: We want to win a prize for our project.
sentences.zh: 我们想为我们的项目赢得一个奖项。

words.eng_def: to be the best in a competition

sentences.en: The project will involve many people among the town.
sentences.zh: 这个项目将涉及小镇中的许多人。

words.eng_def: to include or need something or someone
in the middle of a group of things or people

sentences.en: We need to reach a goal before the end of the year.
sentences.zh: 我们需要在年底前达到一个目标。

words.eng_def: to get to a place or a level

sentences.en: Five years ago, the town had only one office.
sentences.zh: 五年前，这个小镇只有一个办公室。

words.eng_def: a room where people work at desks

sentences.en: The town's color is either blue or green in my mind.
sentences.zh: 在我心里，小镇的颜色要么是蓝色要么是绿色。

words.eng_def: the way things look when light hits them (e.g. red, blue)
one or the other of two things
the part of you that thinks and remembers

vocabulary.eng_def: the main idea of a class or lesson
vocabulary.example: The subject of our class is history.

vocabulary.eng_def: a group of students who learn together
vocabulary.example: Our class has twenty students.

vocabulary.eng_def: the process of growing or improving
vocabulary.example: The development of the town is fast.

vocabulary.eng_def: a small place where people live and work
vocabulary.example: I live in a small town.

vocabulary.eng_def: one of two equal parts of something
vocabulary.example: Half of the students are here.

vocabulary.eng_def: a unit of time equal to 60 seconds
vocabulary.example: We wait for ten minutes.

vocabulary.eng_def: things people eat
vocabulary.example: The food in this restaurant is good.

vocabulary.eng_def: a short time when you stop working
vocabulary.example: We have a break at noon.

vocabulary.eng_def: easy to understand; not confusing
vocabulary.example: The sky is clear today.

vocabulary.eng_def: the time that will come after now
vocabulary.example: I want a good future.

vocabulary.eng_def: one or the other of two things
vocabulary.example: You can have either tea or coffee.

vocabulary.eng_def: before now; in the past
vocabulary.example: Two years ago, I was a child.

vocabulary.eng_def: for each
vocabulary.example: The cost is ten dollars per person.

vocabulary.eng_def: to stay in the same place or condition
vocabulary.example: The food must remain fresh.

vocabulary.eng_def: the highest part of something
vocabulary.example: The book is on top of the desk.

vocabulary.eng_def: in the middle of a group of things or people
vocabulary.example: She is among her friends.

vocabulary.eng_def: to be the best in a competition
vocabulary.example: Our team can win the game.

vocabulary.eng_def: the way things look when light hits them (e.g. red, blue)
vocabulary.example: My favorite color is blue.

vocabulary.eng_def: to include or need something or someone
vocabulary.example: The job involves a lot of work.

vocabulary.eng_def: to get to a place or a level
vocabulary.example: We reach the top of the hill.

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'the main idea of a class or lesson'?
What is the English word for '未来'?
Which word means 'to be the best in a competition'?
What is the English word for '在……之中'?
Which word means 'to get to a place or a level'?

image_prompts: A classroom with students sitting at desks, a teacher pointing to a map of a small town on the board.
A chalkboard with 'Subject: Town Development' written on it, students taking notes.
A list on a whiteboard with 'Clear Plan' at the top, a clock showing the future time.
Students sitting on chairs in a hallway, eating snacks during a break, a clock showing half past an hour.
A plate of local food (bread and cheese) on a table, with a price tag showing 'Value'.
A team of students holding a trophy, cheering after winning a prize.
A group of people standing in a circle in a town square, talking and pointing at a map.
A goal line on a running track, a runner reaching the finish line with a calendar showing the end of year.
A small town with only one office building, a sign saying '5 years ago'.
A person thinking with thought bubbles showing blue and green colors, a small town in the background.
